data.content: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-01T01:29:38.042Z</current_datetime>

I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only the tests with the `Category=Integration` trait in their xUnit project. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-89895443c07d4cf8ba606d549d33d796 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 30}

toolArgs.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with verbose output

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with verbose output

data.reasoningText: The output seems empty. Let me try again with more verbose output.

toolCalls.name: bash
